summary: Tested email/password auth feature: backend API endpoints and frontend UI. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: 4 tests skipped when running full suite due to module-scoped fixture dependency (test_user_id). Tests pass individually. Not a production issue.

critical_code_review_comments: change_password endpoint: if user has NO existing password_hash, current_password check is skipped (line 56: 'if existing_hash and ...'). This means a user with no password can set any new password without any verification. This could be intentional for first-time password setup, but worth confirming.
login_email sets cookie with samesite='none' which requires secure=True (correctly set), but in local dev this may cause issues.

success_rate.backend: 100% (8 passed, 4 skipped due to fixture scope)

seed_data_creation: Created test admin user (test-admin-emailauth / admin_emailauth@test.com) and session token in MongoDB for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All email auth features verified: login-email 403 when disabled, 401 wrong creds when enabled, success sets cookie. Set Password modal works. Settings > General has toggle and Change Password form. Test session: test_session_emailauth_1773985078055. Route for User Management is /users not /user-management.
